title: Pre-existing hygiene: fix the 2 base-branch ESLint errors blocking CI Build/lint
acceptance_criteria: Fix ONLY the 2 pre-existing ESLint errors confirmed on the clean base branch: src/app/[locale]/report/[id]/print/print-report.tsx:~320 and src/lib/report-utils.ts:~65. Run `npm run lint` first to see the exact rule + message; fix the root cause correctly (do NOT add eslint-disable suppressions unless the rule is genuinely a false positive and you justify it).

Minimal, behaviour-preserving fix — no refactor, no scope expansion, no unrelated edits. report-utils.ts is logic-bearing: the fix must not change its runtime behaviour (its existing unit tests must still pass).

After the fix: `npm run lint` exits 0 (zero errors; pre-existing warnings unrelated to these 2 errors are acceptable if they were already warnings), `npm run typecheck` passes, `npm run test` passes (no regression), `npm run build` compiles AND passes its lint gate.
git diff is limited to exactly these 2 files.
output_format: code plus plain English: the exact ESLint rule/message for each, the root-cause fix applied, and confirmation behaviour is unchanged
